## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss ongoing content strategies, refresh results, and plan new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content refreshes: Mixed results; traffic losses dwindling but not conclusive. Control group also losing traffic (16.8%).](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [New initiatives: Launching editorial content for Flex product and creating new PSO (Product-Specific Optimization) folder for industries.](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Next steps: Continue monitoring refresh results, fix bugs, conduct keyword research, and set up content pipelines for new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)

## Topics

### Content Refresh Update

  - [Another batch of refreshes launched](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Control group losing 16.8% traffic (not conclusive, short-term data)](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Traffic losses overall have dwindled slightly](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Impressions up on most refreshed content, but not all](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Team to revisit results post-Labor Day for more conclusive data](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Tanmay to share feedback on issues (pastimes, external links, formatting, images, code snippets)](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)

### New Work Streams

1.  Net new editorial content for Flex launch:
    
      - [Keyword research underway](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
      - [Airbyte to share PR worksheet, positioning, and messaging](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
      - [GrowthX to set up content pipeline in Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [Focus on calibrating content before scaling up](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)

2.  New PSO folder for industries:
    
      - [GrowthX to review and update initial outline](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [Ensure compatibility with existing and future page types (connectors, O2s, personas, jobs-to-be-done)](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
      - [Team to sync and workshop ideas](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)

### Backburner Items

  - [Use cases and personas page types](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)

  - [Custom image workflow for editorial and refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)

### Data Analysis and Concerns

  - [Tanmay working on pulling more profound data (manual process, aiming for 40-50 URLs)](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [Citations observed to be decreasing in past 3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
  - [Team discussing potential impacts of GPT-5 and recent core updates on traffic](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Using Atlas primarily, supplemented with Claude AI for quality assurance](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Planning to launch new content in small batches to test and confirm proper indexing and performance](https://fathom.video/share/8xqyoAxu-XYhozmeeomccRSv2xaVhiiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
